## CenterScape RFID Asset Tracking

Real-time IT asset tracking using active RFID technology for 99%+ location accuracy, continuous automated audits, and full lifecycle management from deployment to disposal.

Precisely monitor and manage your assets with confidence using our state-of-the-art real-time asset tracking solutions. Gain complete visibility into the location, status, and condition of your critical equipment.
